meaning: n.打横褶者,打褶装置,打皱褶着,领布vt.使疲倦,使衰弱
examples: Carll Tucker is the CEO of our company.
Hayden Tucker is my best friend, but he gets weird ideas.
Patrica Racette was born in Manchester, New Hampshire, and won the Richard Tucker Award in 1998.
Mark Tucker, a founding member of the company, said without the funds the service would "simply cease".
